# Status Report Template
# Defines section headers for daily and weekly pipeline status reports.
# Read by scripts/generate-status-report.js at startup.
# Format: section1=Header Text (one per line, in order of appearance in the report)

[daily]
section1=In-Flight Stories
section2=Blocked Items
section3=Pending Human Actions
section4=Recent Activity
section5=Test Count

[weekly]
section1=This Week
section2=Pipeline Funnel
section3=Metric Signal Health
section4=Cycle Time
section5=Risk Flags
